hero.title: Discover the Living Forest
hero.subtitle: Walk among ancient trees, meet forest dwellers, and let the spirit of the woods guide you.

chat.title: Chat with the Forest Spirit
spiritReplies: The forest whispers tales older than time.
Listen to the rustle of leaves; they carry secrets.
Every tree is a library of wisdom.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The roots of the forest are deeply connected.

about.title: About the Forest Explorer
about.text: We are a community of nature lovers dedicated to sharing the beauty and wisdom of the forest. Our mission is to connect people with the wild through storytelling, exploration, and conservation awareness.

questions.q: How can I join a tour?
questions.a: Simply sign up through our contact page.
Yes, our guides ensure all safety measures.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text: We respect your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data...

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.text: By using this website you agree to these terms...

hero.title: The Forest Beckons
hero.subtitle: Enter a world where nature speaks and adventure awaits.

cards.title: Pure Air
cards.desc: Breathe the freshest oxygen straight from ancient trees.

cards.title: Majestic Wildlife
cards.desc: Encounter creatures you've only seen in dreams.

cards.title: Soulful Peace
cards.desc: Find the silence that heals your heart.

animals.title: Meet the Forest Animals
animals.desc: Get close to the untamed spirits of the woods.

birds.title: Symphony of Birds
birds.desc: Listen to melodies that only the forest can compose.

plants.title: Realm of Plants
plants.desc: From delicate moss to towering giants—nature’s hidden kingdom.

quotes.text: An unforgettable experience! The forest felt like home.
quotes.author: Marie

quotes.text: Truly magical. I left with a full heart.
quotes.author: Pierre

home_sections.quote: Nature does not belong to us, we belong to nature.

whispers.title: Forest Whispers
whispers.desc: Every rustle of leaves, every distant bird call, carries a message only the heart understands. Sit quietly, and the forest will speak.

echoes.title: Echoes of the Wild
echoes.quote: The forest does not need you to speak. It only asks that you listen.
echoes.hint: Close your eyes. Hear the stream, the wind, the wings.

hero.title: Legal & Privacy
hero.subtitle: Your rights, our promises — everything you need to know about using the forest responsibly.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: By exploring our forest, you agree to walk gently and respect these guidelines.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.desc: By using this website, you accept these terms in full.
acceptance.long: Your continued use of our site means you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please discontinue use.

updates.title: Updates
updates.desc: We may revise these terms at any time. Continued use means you accept changes.
updates.long: We will post the updated terms on this page. Changes are effective immediately upon posting.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.desc: If anything is unclear, reach out before continuing.
questions.long: Our team is happy to clarify any part of these terms. Contact us via the Contact page.

content_use.title: Use of Content
content_use.short: All content is for personal, non‑commercial use only.
content_use.long: Text, images, and graphics on this website are protected by copyright. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use them commercially without written permission. Sharing with credit is welcome!

conduct.title: User Conduct
conduct.short: Respect the forest and fellow explorers.
conduct.long: You agree not to post harmful, offensive, or illegal content. We reserve the right to remove any user submissions that violate these standards.

account.title: Account Responsibility
account.short: You are responsible for keeping your credentials safe.
account.long: If you create an account, you must provide accurate information and keep your password confidential. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your trust is rooted in our transparency. Learn how we protect your data.

no_agendas.title: No Hidden Agendas
no_agendas.desc: We never sell, rent, or share your personal information without consent.
no_agendas.long: Your privacy is our priority. We do not engage in any data-selling practices. All personal data collected is used solely for the purpose you provided it.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.desc: Your information is encrypted and stored securely using industry standards.
protection.long: We use industry-standard encryption (SSL) to protect data in transit and at rest. Our servers are regularly audited for security vulnerabilities.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.desc: You can request a copy of your data anytime, or ask us to delete it.
transparency.long: Under GDPR and other privacy regulations, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Simply contact us to exercise these rights.

personal.title: Personal Details
personal.short: Your name and email when you contact us or book a tour.
personal.long: When you send a message or make a booking, we collect your name and email address solely to respond to your request. We never use this information for marketing unless you explicitly agree.

browsing.title: Browsing Data
browsing.short: Anonymous analytics about how you use our site to improve it.
browsing.long: We collect anonymous browsing data — pages visited, time spent, and device type — through privacy‑focused analytics. This helps us improve your experience without identifying you personally.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.short: Small files that remember your preferences (you can disable them).
cookies.long: Our website uses minimal cookies to save your language preference and theme choice. These cookies do not track you across other sites. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

still_unsure.title: Something Unclear?
still_unsure.desc: Our rangers are happy to explain anything. Just drop us a message.

cta.title: Now That You Know the Rules…
cta.desc: Step into the forest with confidence, knowing your rights and our promises.
